title: Thick 3D Tetraspeck Beads sample preparation

GLASS BOTTOM CULTURE DISHES, TC TREATED, NEST- Chemglass Life Sciences ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":40}],"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":40,"length":81}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"9463BD10470411F08BE40A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/T7281"}},"1":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"9463BD4F470411F08BE40A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}},"2":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"F26C7ED5488011F094480A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://chemglass.com/glass-bottom-culture-dishes-tc-treated-nest"}}}}
steps: Heat DPBS to approximately 100 °C , using a rice cooker, pressure cooker, or microwave use a thermometer to verify temperature
Let Agar solution cool to 40-50 °C Meanwhile, vortex the stock tetraspeck vial Vortex mixer (Any, xx)

When DPBS-Agar mix has cooled to 40-50 °C , use a P200 micropipette to add 60 µL of the stock beads to the 10 mL of hot Agar-DPBS. For a sparser population of beads, add 30 microliters instead. Vortex the resulting mixture vigorously.

Use a simple transfer pipette to transfer the beads-agarose solution to a glassbottom well plate. Fill the plate to the very top, avoiding the formation of bubbles. Before completely filling the plate, tap the bottom of the plate gently to release any bubbles.

Measure out 104 mg agar to 10.4 mL hot DPBS and mix vigorously with vortexer. If using a larger well plate, you can adjust these amounts accordingly. Verify concentration made using this website Percent (%) Solutions Calculator - PhysiologyWeb .

Carefully place a coverslip on top of the well plate, and let the agarose cool and harden. Shield the sample from light. Agarose-Beads suspension in a thick well plate, with a glass coverslip on top. This is then stored in a larger well plate dish. Store the sample in a larger well plate or similar box to keep the glass from being knocked off. Add tape.
creator: Elena Carlson
